description: Composition Black round ribbed neck top made of cotton lycra blended fabric, has long sleeves with ribbed cuffs, three hook closures on the front and a ribbed hem Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash with similar colours Do not bleach or dry in direct sunlight Use warm iron if required arrow woman caters to every fashionista. This top is a a tried-and-true favourite with a slouchy silhouette that flatters your curves. Pair it with form-fitting denims and kitten heels. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
